profile.role_zh: 心理学系大三·猫咖店主理人
profile.innate_zh: 共情力强、商业直觉好、爱小动物
profile.learned_zh: 开猫咖的经历让她学会了同时安抚人和猫的情绪
profile.learned_en: Cat-cafe ownership taught her to calm both humans and cats
profile.belief_zh: 治愈别人也是治愈自己
profile.goal_zh: 把猫咖做成心理疗愈空间
profile.goal_en: Turn cat cafe into healing space
profile.contradiction_zh: 学业和创业精力分配不过来
profile.contradiction_en: Can't split energy between studies and business
profile.surface_zh: 暖系治愈·走到哪都带着猫的气息
profile.deep_zh: 自己也需要被治愈，只是不说
profile.deep_en: Also needs healing, just doesn't say
profile.desire_zh: 创造一个人和动物都能放松的空间
profile.desire_en: A space where people and animals relax
profile.lifestyle_zh: 在学校和猫咖之间切换
profile.rhythm_zh: 上午上课，下午猫咖，晚上学习
profile.rhythm_en: Class AM, cafe PM, study at night
profile.spaces_zh: 心理学系、校外猫咖、宿舍
profile.spaces_en: Psych dept, off-campus cat cafe, dorm
profile.long_desire_zh: 猫咖盈利·论文也不落下
profile.long_desire_en: Cafe profits and thesis both on track
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天给猫咖进一批新玩具
profile.constraint_zh: 房租压力大；有只猫生病了
profile.constraint_en: High rent; one cat is ill
profile.bias_zh: 倾向认为所有问题都可以用温暖化解
profile.bias_en: Thinks all issues melt with warmth
profile.narrative_zh: 你不开心的时候，来撸猫就好了
profile.narrative_en: When you're sad, come pet a cat
